Save progress on CUDA FA2 integration

completed_milestones: Added minimal varlen FA2 API contract at Python/extension boundary.
Added varlen API contract tests and docs for human and agent readers.
Added prefill runtime mode switch via NANOVLLM_FA2_MODE.
Restored batch_man handwritten batch-view path through torch bind fa2_fwd.
Kept batch_official and varlen placeholder paths active.
open_items: Handwritten CUDA varlen kernel is not wired yet.
Need full mode-matrix regression and performance validation.
next_actions: Implement true handwritten CUDA varlen kernel for varlen_man.
Run complete mode-matrix tests after routing changes settle.
Finalize policy for deps/ and third_party/ tracking.
